x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for Creator enables generative AI capabilities within App Engine Studio, allowing developers to describe functionality in plain language and have code, business logic, and flows generated automatically. Without this plugin, AI-assisted development features are unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Now Assist for Creator from the ServiceNow Store.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_d603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c8d
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for Creator enables generative AI capabilities within App Engine Studio, allowing developers to describe functionality in plain language and have code, business logic, and flows generated automatically. Without this plugin, AI-assisted development features are unavailable.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Now Assist for Creator Installed</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){ var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); sa.addQuery("scope","sn_now_creator"); sa.setLimit(1);sa.query(); if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist for Creator is installed."}; return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist for Creator (sn_now_creator) not installed."}; })()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>CREATOR</module> <number>CHK0006182</number> <order/> <remediation_guidance>Install Now Assist for Creator from the ServiceNow Store.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>d603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c8d</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
